ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number assigned by the airline */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin airport */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination airport */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight status */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight type */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Order number of the flight in the schedule */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time of the flight */,
  "schedule_fix_time" TEXT /* Time when the schedule was last fixed or updated */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual time the flight departed */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time the flight arrived */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number where the flight is scheduled to depart or arrive */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number where the flight is scheduled to operate */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of cargo on the flight */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Estimated fuel consumption for the flight */,
  "snapshot_date" TEXT /* Date when the snapshot was taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES flight_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES flight_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  "frequent_flyer_program" TEXT /* Name of the airline's frequent flyer program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airline record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airline record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airport's official website */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airport record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airport record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., airport staff, airline personnel, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical snapshot */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "snapshot_date" TEXT /* Date when the snapshot was taken */,
  "historical_data" TEXT /* Historical data of the flight in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical data record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
